DP.190.0069:
That’s it! Performance
judging is now over!\f
DP.190.0071:
Looks like everyone’s here!\f
Let’s begin our practice
Acting Competition!\f
First, choose the move your
Pokémon will perform.\f
Next, choose the Judge
who you would like to\r
rate the performance.\f
Each contestant gets to
perform four times.\f
Get your Pokémon to leave
a stronger impression on\f
the Judge, and score more
hearts than the others!\f
Well, here’s to great
performances by all!\f
